sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: AEP FY2025: 운영 EPS 5.97달러, 신규 부하 56기가와트로 성장 전망 상향

keyPoints.text: FY2025 운영 EPS 5.97달러로 전년 5.62달러 대비 성장했으며, GAAP EPS는 6.70달러를 기록했다.
2030년까지의 신규 부하 계약이 56기가와트로 확대됐으며 이는 직전 발표 대비 약 2배 수준으로, 초대형 하이퍼스케일러·데이터센터 개발사와의 서명 계약에 의해 뒷받침된다.
720억 달러 5년 자본계획 외에 50억~80억 달러의 추가 투자 기회를 식별했다고 경영진이 밝혔다.

businessChanges.text: AEP 텍사스 지역의 초대형 데이터센터 및 하이퍼스케일러 고객과의 계약이 급격히 늘어나며, 텍사스 규제 프레임워크(SB6) 시행으로 연결 타임라인 확실성이 높아질 것으로 기대된다.

financialHighlights.text: FY2025 운영이익 31억 9,000만 달러(전년 29억 8,000만 달러), GAAP 이익 35억 8,000만 달러(전년 29억 7,000만 달러)를 기록했다.
Q4 2025 운영 EPS 1.19달러로 전년 동기 대비 소폭 하락했으나, 연간 운영 EPS 5.97달러로 전년 5.62달러 대비 성장을 유지했다.

watchItems.text: 56기가와트 신규 부하의 실제 연결 및 매출 기여 시점이 핵심이다. 720억 달러 자본계획 집행 속도 및 재원 조달 구조, 금리 환경에 따른 요금기반 성장 경로를 분기별로 추적해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Exhibit 99.1 News from AEP AEP Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results, Reaffirms Long-Term Growth Outlook • Full-year GAAP earnings of $6.70 per share and operating earnings of $5.97 per share • 56 GW of incremental load by 2030, up from 28 GW in October, all backed by signed agreements • Opportunities identified for $5 billion to $8 billion of incremental investment beyond AEP’s $72 billion five-year capital plan • 2026 operating earnings guidance of $6.15 to $6.45 per share and long-term operating earnings growth rate of 7% to 9% reaffirmed COLUMBUS, Ohio (Feb 12, 2026) – American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) today reported fourth-quarter 2025 GAAP earnings of $582  Normalized numeric aliases: $5 billion = 50억 달러; $8 billion = 80억 달러; $72 billion = 720억 달러; $582 million = 5억 8,200만 달러; $664 million = 6억 6,400만 달러; $638 million = 6억 3,800만 달러; $6.70 = 6.70달러; $5.97 = 5.97달러; $8 = 8달러; $1.09 = 1.09달러; $582 = 582달러; $664 = 664달러; $1.25 = 1.25달러; $638 = 638달러; $1.19 = 1.19달러.

earnings of $660 million or $1.24 per share in fourth-quarter 2024. Year-end 2025 GAAP earnings were $3.58 billion or $6.70 per share, compared with GAAP earnings of $2.97 billion or $5.60 per share for year-end 2024. Year-end 2025 operating earnings were $3.19 billion or $5.97 per share, compared with operating earnings of $2.98 billion or $5.62 per share for year-end 2024. See the detailed GAAP to operating earnings reconciliation at the end of this press release. AEP reaffirmed its 2026 operating earnings outlook of $6.15 to $6.45 per share and its long-term operating earnings growth rate of 7% to 9%. These results reflect AEP’s continued focus on  Normalized numeric aliases: $660 million = 6억 6,000만 달러; $3.58 billion = 35억 8,000만 달러; $2.97 billion = 29억 7,000만 달러; $3.19 billion = 31억 9,000만 달러; $2.98 billion = 29억 8,000만 달러; $660 = 660달러; $1.24 = 1.24달러; $3.58 = 3.58달러; $2.97 = 2.97달러; $5.62 = 5.62달러; $3.19 = 3.19달러; $5.97 = 5.97달러; $2.98 = 2.98달러; $6.15 = 6.15달러; $6.45 = 6.45달러.

all backed by signed letters of agreement with well-capitalized hyperscalers and mega-sized data center developers. AEP is committed to building the necessary transmission and distribution infrastructure in Texas and is partnering with ERCOT to bring these large loads online in a timely manner and within the regulatory construct. The implementation of Texas Senate Bill 6 is expected to provide additional clarity and certainty on the timing of when these new loads will interconnect. Additional opportunities are expanding the company’s current $72 billion five-year capital plan. AEP has identified $5 billion to $8 billion in additional transmission and generation projects. These include competitively awarded 765‑kilovolt (kV) transmission projects selected by multiple regional transmission organizations, both inside and outside AEP’s service territory.
